name: i_sheets_oauth_resume_after_interruption
notes: Mid-connect topic switch: the owner starts the Sheets OAuth kickoff, detours to an unrelated question, then returns. The tenant_integration_state phase_2_auth pending row (written by start_sheets_oauth) must survive the detour untouched, and the deterministic auth-wait gate (onboarding/sheets_resume.py) must still fire correctly on the resumed 'done'. Setup: `setup --onboarded` then `script <tenant> i_sheets_oauth_resume_after_interruption.json`.

steps.message: I want to connect my Google Sheet
steps.note: Mints the real authorize_url and writes the phase_2_auth pending state.

steps.message: Actually wait, what does Viabe cost per month?
steps.note: Unrelated detour — carries no floor 'done'-class token, so it must NOT mis-fire the sheets auth-wait gate; expect a real answer or honest deferral about pricing, not a re-prompt of the connect ask.

steps.message: Ok sorry, back to connecting the sheet — done, I finished it
steps.note: Resume intent with a floor 'done' token — the auth-wait gate must still be armed after the detour and give its honest not-yet-connected line, never silently drop or fabricate a connection.
